response.justification: Candidate is a strong full-stack software engineer with web, mobile, and some embedded background, but has no demonstrated experience in SoC/IP modeling, AI accelerator hardware, deep-learning workload optimization, GPU architecture, or hardware-software co-design. The role requires deep specialization in performance architecture for AI hardware, which is entirely absent from this resume. Educational background (BS in CS) with no advanced degree or hardware-focused research also misaligns with the principal-level hardware architecture requirements.
strengths: Long track record (10+ years) of senior software engineering across diverse stacks
Some low-latency, high-throughput systems experience (Dunnhumby microservices)
Demonstrated initiative through open-source projects, talks, and workshops
concerns: No SoC/IP modeling, hardware design, or AI accelerator experience
No deep learning, GPU architecture, or DNN training/inference optimization background
Lacks PhD/MS and hardware-software co-design expertise expected at principal level

key_factors.factor: Missing AI accelerator / SoC hardware expertise
No deep learning or GPU architecture background
